sentences.target: Ich nehme den Vorwurf nicht persönlich.

translations.de: Ich nehme den Vorwurf nicht persönlich.
translations.en: I’m not taking the accusation personally.
translations.es: No me tomo la acusación como algo personal.
translations.fr: Je ne prends pas cette accusation personnellement.
translations.it: Non prendo questa accusa sul personale.
translations.ko: 저는 그 비난을 개인적으로 받아들이지 않아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我不把这个指责当成针对我个人。
translations.yue: 我唔會將呢個指責當係針對我。
translations.ru: Я не воспринимаю это обвинение на свой счет.
translations.pt: Não levo essa acusação para o lado pessoal.
translations.he: אני לא לוקחת את ההאשמה באופן אישי.
translations.vi: Tôi không coi lời buộc tội đó là chuyện cá nhân.
translations.ar: أنا لا آخذ هذا الاتهام بشكل شخصي.
translations.nl: Ik trek me die beschuldiging niet persoonlijk aan.
translations.uk: Я не сприймаю це звинувачення особисто.
translations.hu: Nem veszem magamra ezt a vádat.
translations.hi: मैं इस आरोप को व्यक्तिगत रूप से नहीं ले रही हूँ.
translations.pl: Nie biorę tego oskarżenia do siebie.
translations.el: Δεν παίρνω αυτή την κατηγορία προσωπικά.
translations.nb: Jeg tar ikke denne anklagen personlig.
translations.id: Aku tidak menanggapi tuduhan itu secara pribadi.
translations.sv: Jag tar inte den här anklagelsen personligt.
translations.da: Jeg tager ikke denne anklage personligt.
translations.ja: その非難を個人的には受け取りません。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (1st sg, present); selects an accusative object 'den Vorwurf' and a manner adjunct.
Definite article; masculine accusative singular, determiner of 'Vorwurf'.
Common noun; masculine; direct object in accusative.
Negation particle; scopes over the manner adjunct/predicate ('persönlich'), yielding 'not personally'.
Adverbial use of an adjective; manner modifier indicating how the accusation is taken.

translations.tr: O, bu suçlamayı sadece görmezden geliyor.
translations.vi: Anh ấy chỉ phớt lờ lời buộc tội đó.
translations.hu: Egyszerűen figyelmen kívül hagyja a vádat.
translations.hi: वह बस उस आरोप को नज़रअंदाज़ करता है.
translations.pl: On po prostu ignoruje to oskarżenie.
translations.ro: El pur și simplu ignoră acuzația.
translations.ja: 彼はその非難をただ無視する。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject.
Finite main verb (3rd sg, present); transitive, taking 'den Vorwurf' as accusative object.
Definite article; masculine accusative singular, determiner of 'Vorwurf'.
Common noun; masculine; accusative direct object.
Sentential/manner adverb; downplays complexity, modifying the verb phrase.

sentences.target: Sie versteht den Vorwurf jetzt besser.

translations.de: Sie versteht den Vorwurf jetzt besser.
translations.en: She understands the accusation better now.
translations.ko: 이제 그녀는 그 비난을 더 잘 이해해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 她现在更明白这项指责了。
translations.yue: 佢而家對呢個指責理解得更好。
translations.ru: Теперь она лучше понимает это обвинение.
translations.pt: Agora ela entende melhor a acusação.
translations.he: עכשיו היא מבינה את ההאשמה טוב יותר.
translations.vi: Giờ cô ấy hiểu lời buộc tội đó rõ hơn.
translations.ar: هي الآن تفهم الاتهام بشكل أفضل.
translations.nl: Ze begrijpt die beschuldiging nu beter.
translations.uk: Вона тепер краще розуміє це звинувачення.
translations.hu: Most már jobban érti a vádat.
translations.hi: अब वह उस आरोप को बेहतर समझती है.
translations.id: Sekarang dia lebih memahami tuduhan itu.
translations.ro: Acum ea înțelege mai bine acuzația.
translations.ja: 今、彼女はその非難をよりよく理解している。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject.
Finite main verb (3rd sg, present); takes an accusative object.
Definite article; masculine accusative singular, determiner of 'Vorwurf'.
Common noun; masculine; accusative direct object.
Temporal adverb; indicates present time reference for the event.
Comparative degree adverb (from 'gut'); modifies 'versteht' to express improved degree of understanding.

sentences.target: Mir tut der Vorwurf wirklich leid.

translations.de: Mir tut der Vorwurf wirklich leid.
translations.en: I’m really sorry about the accusation.
translations.zh-Hans: 对这次指责我真的很抱歉。
translations.yue: 我真係為呢個指責感到抱歉。
translations.ru: Мне действительно жаль из-за этого обвинения.
translations.vi: Tôi thật sự xin lỗi về lời buộc tội đó.
translations.uk: Мені справді шкода через це звинувачення.
translations.hi: मुझे उस आरोप के लिए सचमुच अफ़सोस है.
translations.pl: Naprawdę przykro mi z powodu tego oskarżenia.
translations.nb: Jeg er virkelig lei meg for anklagen.
translations.id: Aku benar-benar minta maaf atas tuduhan itu.
translations.sv: Jag är verkligen ledsen över anklagelsen.
translations.ro: Îmi pare cu adevărat rău pentru acea acuzație.
translations.da: Jeg er virkelig ked af anklagen.
translations.ja: その非難について本当に申し訳ありません。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular dative personal pronoun; experiencer/indirect object of the expression.
Finite main verb (3rd sg, present); part of the fixed expression 'jdm leidtun' ('to be sorry'), with subject 'der Vorwurf'. Linked with 'leid' via compound_id.
Definite article; masculine nominative singular, determiner of the subject 'Vorwurf'.
Common noun; masculine; nominative subject of 'tut (leid)'.
Degree/focusing adverb; intensifies the predicate 'leidtun'.
Predicative adjective in the fixed verb construction 'leidtun'; forms the lexical unit with 'tut'. Linked via compound_id.

Sie versteht den Vorwurf jetzt besser.
Mir tut der Vorwurf wirklich leid.
de: Ich nehme den Vorwurf nicht persönlich.
Sie versteht den Vorwurf jetzt besser.
Mir tut der Vorwurf wirklich leid.
en: I’m not taking the accusation personally.
She understands the accusation better now.
I’m really sorry about the accusation.
